EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
LIBYA.
DNC 08, DNC 09.
VESSEL, NUMEROUS PERSONS ON BOARD, REQUESTING
ASSISTANCE BETWEEN TRIPOLI (32-53-14N 013-11-29E)
AND 34-00-00N 013-00-00E AT 310030Z JAN. VESSELS
IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT,
ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO MRCC ROME,

3906 5908 4409, FAX: 390 6592 2737,
